verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The holy hills of heaven call me to mansions bright across the sea, Where loved ones wait and crowns are given, When the hills of home keep calling me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This house of flesh is but a prison, Bars of bones hold my soul, But the doors of clay, are gonna burst wide open, When the angels set my spirit free. I'll take my flight like a mighty eagle, When the hills of home start calling me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I see loved ones over yonder, The tears are gone and hearts are free, And from the throne king Jesus beckons, Oh the hills of home are calling me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the hills of home God's calling me
